[㥁] variant form of 德.

[德]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *tɯːɡ ): semantic 彳 ( “ road ” ) + phonetic 惪 ( OC *tɯːɡ , “ virtue ” ) . 惪 is corrupted into 𢛳 .

[徳]
徳 evolved naturally from earlier forms of the Chinese script; 德 was reintroduced via knowledge that 徳 / 德 etymologically contains 直 as a component.
